about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: We are a company of people & solutions.
about.heroImageAlt: Elevators are the lifelines of your building
about.heroTitle: Elevators are the lifelines of your building.
about.heroText: Elevators are the lifelines of your building. And when you work with Ascend Elevators, we are your service line. From our technicians to our owners, we know you, your building, and your elevator equipment. Keeping everything well-maintained. Making quick repairs when problems occur. Leading modernization and equipment replacement when necessary. Always with clear communication, quality craftsmanship, honesty, and transparency.

stats.stat1Label: service calls resolved on first visit
stats.stat2Label: customer retention for 13 years of service

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.subtitle: The Ascend Way
approach.text: We are not a parts company like the large elevator service providers. We are a company of people and solutions. It starts by truly knowing our clients and their circumstances. Knowing elevators and escalators in a way that only a team with our experience and expert eye can see.

peopleFocus.title: Because elevator service is about people
peopleFocus.text: Elevators are for people. They're how office workers get home to their children. How hospital patients travel to the surgical floor. How people bring home their groceries. We work for these people. Just like you do. They depend on you, and you can depend on us.

experience.title: Our Experience
experience.text: In a world of apples, we're the orange. Our work isn't about a service checklist. It's about everyone, from our technicians to our executives, being just a phone call or message away. Recommending the right solution for your building, every time.

technicians.title: Master technicians at your service.
technicians.text: With over 28 years of average experience, plus rigorous training and certifications, our certified technicians can diagnose and resolve even the most complex elevator systems.
technicians.stat2Label: years National Elevator Industry Education Program

cta.title: YOUR ELEVATOR ALLY
cta.description:
Discover the Difference with Ascend Elevator.
How can we help you today?

carePlans.title: CUSTOMIZED CARE PLANS FOR YOUR BUILDING'S LIFELINES
carePlans.subtitle: Like people, elevators need targeted, high-quality preventive care that keeps them in good shape and operating safely for as long as possible.
carePlans.description: Innovation and expertise are often the most expensive equipment in any building. If you have an in-house team, we provide training and technical support. Otherwise, your elevators need long-term expert care that extends the life of your equipment and helps keep it code compliant. Allied Elevator offers flexible, customized maintenance programs designed for your specific needs. We consider your building type, elevator usage, tenant profile, and your comfort level when building them.

difference.title: THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN HAPPY AND UNHAPPY TENANTS.

expertise.title: Expertise in Action
expertise.description: Our qualified technicians are dedicated to providing exceptional service and safe maintenance for every elevator. With extensive experience and continuous training, they ensure your equipment operates optimally and always meets the highest industry standards.
expertise.feature2: Technical expertise for all elevator types

guarantee.title: SECURE THE FUTURE OF YOUR RIDE.
guarantee.subtitle: SIMPLIFIED ELEVATOR MODERNIZATION
guarantee.description: We are experts in modernizing your elevators for the future. Combining the latest technology with our expertise, we ensure your elevators are efficient, safe, and modern. From simple upgrades to complete modernizations, we provide customized solutions for your needs.

keep.title: Keeping your elevators updated, looking good and safe makes your riders happy and you a hero.
keep.description: Our modernization solutions are delivered through careful management and transparent communication, minimizing disruptions and maximizing safety. We handle every detail, from planning to implementation.

why.title: Why Modernize with Ascend Elevators?
why.description: Modernizing your elevators is a smart investment that improves user experience, increases property value, and reduces operational costs.
why.imageAlt: Woman using phone in modern elevator

addLife.title: ADD NEW LIFE TO YOUR BUILDING

cta.title: HOW CAN WE HELP YOU?
cta.description: Every building situation is different. Let us understand what you're facing so we can better understand how to help you.

client.title: EVERY REPAIR MATTERS
client.description: Elevators are the lifeline of your building. At Ascend Elevators, we provide fast and effective solutions for every problem. With a proactive approach and specialized technicians, we minimize downtime and reduce repair costs. Our 24/7 service ensures you have immediate support when you need it.
client.item3: Strategies for Old or Obsolete Equipment

failures.title: Failures happen. But a quick repair can make the difference between happy and unhappy tenants.
failures.description1: Allied is your local elevator service partner. We're here, invested in the communities we serve. Our local team offers a full range of services and the purchasing and management process like large companies. Acting quickly to minimize disruptions, we shorten weeks from your repair time.
failures.description2: When you call Allied, we'll dispatch a technician, and act quickly, making an assessment. There may be only one way to get you back in operation. We'll work alongside you, not for a contract, and tell you about the price while answering any questions you may have. Our field technicians will perform the repair; it's not just Customer Service, Accounting + Field Teams working together to ensure you get the best service and repair. Our priority is always focusing on your needs, safety, and your riders' experience.

stats.stat2Label: Union certified technicians trained on the latest equipment
stats.stat3Label: We provide all testing to meet state and local codes
stats.stat4Label: Expertise working with all elevator + escalator brands

commonProblems.item3: My elevator has electrical issues or has lost power.
commonProblems.item5: My elevator has erratic movement or stops between floors.

0.name: Besnik Gashi
0.title: Facility Manager, Prishtina
0.text: Ascend has revolutionized our building's vertical transportation. Their maintenance is proactive, and our tenants constantly compliment the smooth ride. Knowing we have a reliable, local team here in Kosovo makes all the difference.

1.name: Adelina Haxhiu
1.title: Property Owner, Lipjan
1.text: As a property owner in Lipjan, I appreciate Ascend's professionalism and speed. They were the only team that could manage the modernization of our old system perfectly. Excellent work!

2.name: Edon Gashi
2.title: Building Administrator, Ferizaj
2.text: Exceptional service! Ascend's engineers are highly skilled and always arrive quickly. They provide clear and cost-effective solutions—not just quick fixes. Our elevators are operating safer and more efficiently than ever!

3.name: Luljeta Berisha
3.title: Hotel Manager, Durrës (Albania)
3.text: Even operating outside of Kosovo, Ascend provides unparalleled support. Their diagnostics are accurate, and their commitment to safety is top-tier. A truly reliable elevator partner.
